channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The world is connected by copper. It's a huge target for thieves
item.description: The value of copper is rising, and thieves can make money by stripping it from phone poles, streetlights and EV chargers. But those thefts cost the re...

item.title: Ukrainian drones strike a St. Petersburg oil terminal ahead of Putin visit
item.description: Ukrainian drones struck an oil terminal in St. Petersburg and set it ablaze, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said, as the city hosted an annua...

item.title: The White House's new site about 'aliens' has nothing to do with UFOs
item.description: The site compares undocumented immigrants to extraterrestrials, refers to people as "it," and says "they do not belong here"

item.title: Leading research center turns to genetic therapy to tackle brain disorders
item.description: The Allen Institute in Seattle believes current knowledge of the brain is sufficient to begin repairing it when it malfunctions.
